positive: A minimalist and abstract depiction of a celestial journey: a stylized, bioluminescent astronaut silhouette floating through a nebula of deep indigo and ethereal teal. The scene is dominated by geometric celestial bodies (planets, moons) rendered with clean, solid color blocks and crisp linework. Include stylized constellations forming simple, recognizable patterns. The composition must be centered and high-contrast, suitable for a single-color print on dark fabric, using gradients sparingly for depth. Retro-futuristic cosmic exploration style, clean graphic novel aesthetic, vector illustration quality, dramatic edge lighting, centered symmetry, vibrant contrast, print-ready design, isolated on a dark void background.
negative: photorealistic, messy, detailed faces, text, writing, logo, watermark, low resolution, artifacts, blur, grainy, noise, poor composition, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, dirty, cluttered, bokeh
